title: The Unstable SMP Simulator
description:
MOST UPDATED Unstable Simulator

This is a Minecraft modpack page for the Unstable SMP Battle Simulator, bundling CarpetPVPMaps’ battle maps with pre-installed PvP and performance mods so players can install and play instantly without manual setup.
body:
# ⚠️ THIS SIMULATOR DOES NOT BELONG TO ME

![Unstable SMP: The LAW](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5900f25dd38ff46d1e2cde098e1847c735414c4e.jpeg)
*Image from [Wemmbu](https://youtu.be/f_aRA-KcTQs)*

---

## 📦 About

I made this modpack for players to install Unstable Simulator **more easily** — without the tedious process of installing maps, selecting mods, and configuring everything manually.

**All the necessary mods for PvP and optimization are pre-installed.**

---

## 🗺️ Maps

Many of these maps features like mace bot will not work at 1.21.11

All Credits to _**[CarpetPVPMaps](https://www.youtube.com/@CarpetPVPMaps)**_

| Map | Link |
|-----|------|
| Unstable SMP Final Law Battle Simulator | [Download](https://www.minecraftmaps.com/52118-unstable-smp-final-law-battle-simulator) |
| 2v1000 Law Battle Simulator Unstable SMP | [Download](https://www.minecraftmaps.com/52165-2v1000-law-battle-simulator-unstable-smp) |
| Unstable SMP Great Sea Law Battle Simulator | [Download](https://www.minecraftmaps.com/52235-unstable-smp-great-sea-law-battle-simulator-map) |
| Unstable SMP Tournament Simulator (FREE) | [Download](https://www.patreon.com/posts/unstable-smp-map-155409813) |

> ❌ **Not included due to max file size:**
> [Unstable SMP Experience](https://www.patreon.com/posts/unstable-smp-map-156417949)

🛒 You can buy more maps from [CarpetPVPMaps Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/cw/CarpetPVPMaps)

---

## 🧩 Mods

| Mod | Category |
|-----|----------|
| [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) | Core |
| [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) | Core |
| [Modify Player Data](https://modrinth.com/mod/modify-player-data) | Core |
| [Carpet crit fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-crit-fix) | PvP Fix |
| [Carpet mace fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-mace-fix) | PvP Fix |
| [Wither Death Sounds](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wither-death-sound) | QoL |
| [ukulib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib) | Library |
| [uku's Armor HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukus-armor-hud) | QoL |
| [BetterHurtCam](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterhurtcam) | QoL |
| [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) | Performance |
| [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) | Performance |
| [Alternate Current](https://modrinth.com/mod/alternate-current) | Performance |
| [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) | QoL |
| and more.. | — |

---

## 👥 Multiplayer

You can use [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) to play with others!

> ⚠️ Your friends need to have the **same modpack** installed too.

---

## 💻 Custom Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/trigger lobby` | Teleports you back to the lobby |
| `/trigger stab` | Gives you orbital stab shot |
| `/trigger nuke` | Gives you orbital nuke shot |

---

## 🎬 Showcase

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9CYqp5DdcUw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Thanks to **CarpetPVPMaps** for creating this awesome map!!

---

## ✨ What does this modpack add?

This modpack is an **all-in-one package** for the Unstable SMP Battle Simulator experience. Instead of manually downloading maps, searching for mods, and configuring everything yourself, everything comes **ready to play out of the box.**

### Features

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| 🗺️ **Pre-installed Maps** | Multiple battle simulator maps by CarpetPVPMaps — Final Law Battle, 2v1000, Great Sea, and Tournament Simulator |
| ⚔️ **PvP Fixes** | Critical hit and mace mechanics fixed for accurate combat |
| ⚡ **Performance Optimization** | Sodium, Lithium, and Alternate Current for the best FPS and TPS |
| 🎮 **Quality of Life** | Armor HUD, AppleSkin, BetterHurtCam, and Wither Death Sounds |
| 💬 **Custom Commands** | Lobby teleport, orbital stab, and orbital nuke via simple `/trigger` commands |
| 👥 **Multiplayer Ready** | Use Essential to invite friends and play together instantly |

### Why download this?

> ✅ **No setup hassle** — Skip the tedious process of installing maps and mods one by one
> 
> ✅ **Everything included** — Maps, mods, and configurations are all pre-packaged
> 
> ✅ **Optimized out of the box** — Performance mods already configured
> 
> ✅ **Just install and play** — Launch the modpack and jump straight into battle

---

### ⚠️ You need minimum 18 render distance and simulation distance for maps to work
